articles.description: Is this the night the villains of the Premier League title race became victors, asks BBC Sport Chief Football Writer Phil McNulty?
articles.title: Is this night Arsenal's 'villains' became Premier League victors?

articles.description: MIchael Carrick says he will take "lessons" from his first defeat in charge of Manchester United in the Premier League.
articles.title: Carrick looks for 'lessons' after first Man Utd loss

articles.description: Lance Stroll says he cannot do more than 15 laps before risking nerve damage to his hands, according to Aston Martin team principal Adrian Newey.
articles.title: Aston Martin: Adrian Newey says Honda engines pose nerve damage risk to drivers

articles.description: Premier League LIVE: Arsenal go seven points clear as Manchester City slip at home to Nottingham Forest, who earn a valuable point in the relegation scrap.
articles.title: Premier League LIVE: Arsenal go seven points clear; West Ham boost survival chances

articles.description: British number one Emma Raducanu says she wants to "bring my instincts back out" as she prepares for Indian Wells in California.
articles.title: Emma Raducanu to 'tap into a few people' for coaching advice

articles.description: England, Harry Brook and Brendon McCullum need Jos Buttler now as much as ever as they face reigning champions India in the T20 World Cup semi-final.
articles.title: T20 Cricket World Cup, India vs England: Harry Brook and Brendon McCullum need prime Jos Buttler in seismic semi-final

articles.description: The Bahrain and Saudi Arabia Grands Prix are under threat as a consequence of the US-Israel war with Iran.
articles.title: Formula 1: Bahrain and Saudi Arabia races under threat because of conflict in Middle East

articles.description: USA's ice hockey teams restored some national pride as both won gold at the Winter Olympics. Now their men's baseball team aims to follow suit at the World Baseball Classic.
articles.title: World Baseball Classic 2026: USA name star-studded roster in bid to regain title

articles.description: Pep Guardiola's Manchester City have blinked first in the run-in during this season's Premier League title race - so has the momentum now swung Arsenal's way?
articles.title: Man City 2-2 Nottingham Forest: Pep Guardiola's side blink first in title race

articles.description: Seven-time world champion Lewis Hamilton says "I'm going to be here until that happens" as he pushes for a grand prix in Africa.
articles.title: Lewis Hamilton wants grand prix in Africa before retiring
